creator: johans@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This has been discussed in email, also with decke to investigate why it 
was not working properly from RedPorts. Correct distfiles were still 
available via a second master site, which works fine for most users. 

By now the texinfo port has been updated, which fixes the issue for 
RedPorts use as well. A permanent fix is being worked on.
